base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of weapons_projectiles — a projectile (special_attack_proj) from 1988 mega man 2. 8 RM weapons + Mega Buster: Metal Blade (8-directional), Crash Bomber (attach+explode), Bubble Lead (gravity drop), Quick Boomerang, Atomic Fire (charged), Time Stopper, Leaf Shield (4-leaf rotating), Air Shooter (8-tornado spread) + Items 1/2/3. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 8 RM weapons + Mega Buster: Metal Blade (8-directional), Crash Bomber (attach+explode), Bubble Lead (gravity drop), Quick Boomerang, Atomic Fire (charged), Time Stopper, Leaf Shield (4-leaf rotating), Air Shooter (8-tornado spread) + Items 1/2/3
